general.title: Rename Labels [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions:
Rename and group labels in the prior processed analysis dataset based on the provided dictionary, keeping the original annotation column.\
Please refer to DUET Documentation, GitHub Documentation

parameters.name: Source Annotation
parameters.description: Annotation in the current dataset containing the original labels to be renamed.

parameters.name: New Annotation
parameters.description: Annotation to be added to the dataset, containing the new labels after renaming.
